name: Cox Energy America, S.A.B de C.V.
summary: Cox Energy America, S.A.B De C.V., a renewable energy company, engages in the generation of solar power. It develops, promotes, and operates photovoltaic plants. The company operates a portfolio of projects with a capacity of 1,808 MWp located in Mexico, Colombia, Central America, and the Caribbean. It is also involved in the provision of project development, financing, procurement, and operation and maintenance services. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico. Cox Energy America, S.A.B De C.V. is a subsidiary of Cox Energy Solar S.A.
